permits.description: Demolition and replacement of approx. 1,550 SF basement concrete slab, including removal of deteriorated concrete, surface prep, and installation of new 1.5–2 in. high-strength topping slab. Apply new cementitious parge coat to approx. 1,300 SF of basement walls. No structural changes or utility relocations included.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($30,000); keyword: demolition; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The property is owner-occupied with over 20 years of ownership, and the recent permit for basement slab replacement represents foundational maintenance rather than high-end aesthetic renovations like kitchens or bathrooms.
